$comment: Simulation scenario definitions. Each scenario defines a set of simulated agents and events for stress-testing scheduling and lease race conditions.

scenarios.description: Two agents attempt to acquire the same task simultaneously. Verifies FCFS + WRITE.lock atomicity.
One agent uses the same bridge_token twice. Verifies single-use nonce enforcement.
Agent proposes based on a queue that is one event behind HEAD. Verifies B1 bridge check.
